Element Page

Header Styles

Five navigation header variants — transparent scroll, dark solid, light solid, minimal, and centered two-row.

Home/Elements/Header

header-style-01 — Transparent → white on scroll

Transparent on home hero, becomes white with shadow when scrolled or on inner pages. Site default — used in production.

Responsive · Accessible
SyncCore
ModulesPricingAboutContact
Request a Demo

Hero / transparent state

Transparent on hero

Becomes solid when scrolled past 60px.

SyncCore
ModulesPricingAboutContact
Request a Demo

Scrolled / solid state

White on scroll

Gains white bg + shadow after 60px scroll.

header-style-02 — Dark solid

Always dark background header — no transparency or scroll transition. Ideal for dark-themed landing pages.

Responsive · Accessible
SyncCore
ModulesPricingAbout UsContact
Request a Demo

header-style-03 — Light / white solid

Always white background with subtle border. Standard navigation for inner pages.

Responsive · Accessible
SyncCore
ModulesPricingAbout UsCareersContact
Request a Demo

header-style-04 — Minimal

Compact one-row header with text-only logo and uppercase nav links. Suited for app dashboards.

Responsive · Accessible
SyncCore
ModulesPricingAboutContact
Get Started

header-style-05 — Centered two-row

Logo centered on top row, navigation centered on a second row. Classic editorial/magazine layout.

Responsive · Accessible
SyncCore
